無法實際執行 Palworld 伺服器: cannot actually run a Palworld server
(SteamCMD/PalServer 在 macOS 不支援)。請把 agen: (SteamCMD/PalServer are not supported on macOS). Install the agent on a Windows or Linux machine; this one is only for development or managing remote hosts.
原生(直接在這台主機上運行,推薦): Native (runs directly on this machine, recommended)
留空 = 安裝到 agent 資料夾。填既有 PalServer 安裝目錄會直接: Leave empty to install into the agent folder. An existing PalServer directory is adopted as-is; an empty or new path gets a fresh install.
首次安裝會下載 Palworld 伺服器檔案,: The first install downloads the Palworld server files, which are
,需要一段時間,請耐心等候 —— 建立後可在: , so it takes a while — after creating, watch install progress in the
分頁看安裝進度。(填既有安裝目錄則會直接採用、跳過下載。): tab. (An existing install directory is adopted directly, skipping the download.)
已生成新的設定檔。原損壞檔案已備份為 {path}.corrupt-*.bak: A fresh config file was generated. The corrupted file was backed up as {path}.corrupt-*.bak
已生成新的設定檔。: A fresh config file was generated.
無法正確解析,伺服器可能會忽略設定或開出一個全新的世界。: could not be parsed. The server may ignore your settings or start a brand-new world.
可以生成一份新的設定檔: A fresh config file can be generated
(依 GUI 目前儲存的世界設定): (from the world settings currently stored in the GUI)
。原本的損壞檔案會先備份起來,不會直接刪除。: . The corrupted file is backed up first, never deleted outright.
在 agent 的視窗裡有列出可用位址;遠端請填 VPN 位址(如 Tailsc: The agent window lists available addresses; for remote access use a VPN address (e.g. Tailscale 100.x).
快完成了!輸入配對碼: Almost there! Enter the pairing code

進階:改用 API token 連線: Advanced: connect with an API token
agent 視窗上的 API token: API token from the agent window
不用動路由器、也不怕外網攻擊。你和朋友裝同一套免費 VPN、加入同一個網路,就像: No router changes, no exposure to the open internet. You and your friends install the same free VPN and join one network — like being on the same WiFi.
免註冊、建個房間邀朋友加入,最適合遊戲聯機。: No sign-up — create a room and invite friends. Great for gaming.
用 Google/GitHub 帳號登入,安全穩定,適合長期使用。: Sign in with Google/GitHub. Secure and stable — good for long-term use.
想讓朋友不裝 VPN 直接連?交給我們設定: Want friends to join without a VPN? Let us set it up
公開 IP 直連需要處理路由器連接埠轉發、防火牆、浮動 IP / CGNAT 等: Direct public-IP hosting means dealing with port forwarding, firewalls, dynamic IPs / CGNAT — painful for beginners. Our IP direct-connect setup service gets it all configured for you in one go.
(在路由器後面,需要設定連接埠轉發才能直連): (behind a router — port forwarding is required for direct connections)
提示:朋友連線用的是「遊戲埠 UDP {port}」。若朋友連不進來,先確認伺服: Tip: friends connect via game port UDP {port}. If they can't get in, first check the server is running and the firewall allows it.
搜尋道具名稱或輸入 ID…: Search item names or enter an ID…
搜尋帕魯名稱或輸入 ID…: Search Pal names or enter an ID…
安裝 PalDefender 可解鎖更多指令: Install PalDefender to unlock more commands
從左側選一個指令,或直接在下方輸入原始指令。: Pick a command on the left, or type a raw command below.
輸入原始 RCON 指令,例如 ShowPlayers: Enter a raw RCON command, e.g. ShowPlayers
感謝每一位支持 palserver GUI 的贊助者,完整名單請見:: Thanks to everyone supporting palserver GUI — see the full list at:
已儲存,重啟伺服器後生效: Saved — takes effect after a server restart
這些設定寫入伺服器的: These settings are written to the server's
。沒有萬用解 —— 提高 Tick 率吃 CPU,人數與據點越多越吃力。改完請觀: . There is no silver bullet — higher tick rates cost CPU, and more players/bases make it harder. After changes, watch server FPS on the Players tab.
調校很煩?交給我們維護: Tired of tuning? Let us maintain it
不想每次改版都自己救火、半夜還要爬起來救伺服器?: Don't want to firefight every game update or rescue your server at 3 AM?
小心~您有 {n} 項變更尚未儲存!(重啟伺服器後生效): Careful — {n} unsaved changes! (take effect after restart)
搜尋名稱或直接輸入 ID…: Search names or enter an ID…
確定要刪除所有物種數值調整嗎?所有帕魯會改回原本設定,重啟伺服器後生效,此動作無: Delete all species stat changes? Every Pal reverts to its original values (takes effect after a server restart). This cannot be undone.
已刪除所有物種數值調整,重啟伺服器後生效: All species stat changes deleted; takes effect after a server restart
這裡列出已寫入 PalSchema 的所有物種數值調整;點「編輯」可載回上方表單: All species stat changes written to PalSchema are listed here; click Edit to load one back into the form above.
有未儲存的變更,確定要關閉嗎?: There are unsaved changes. Close anyway?
儲存後,重啟伺服器才會生效。: Changes take effect after a server restart.
確定要刪除「{name}」嗎?世界存檔會保留在磁碟上。: Delete "{name}"? World saves stay on disk.
無法連線到伺服器的 REST API: Can't reach the server's REST API
若玩家位置南北顛倒,按此翻轉: If player positions look flipped north-south, toggle this
若玩家位置東西顛倒,按此翻轉: If player positions look flipped east-west, toggle this
貼上地圖圖片網址,或用「上傳底圖」選擇你自己的世界地圖截圖(圖片需為整張方形世界: Paste a map image URL, or use "Upload background" to pick your own world-map screenshot (must be the full square world map).
調整底圖直到地形與玩家實際位置吻合(不同來源、不同遊戲版本的地圖裁切範圍不一樣): Adjust the background until terrain matches actual player positions (maps from different sources/game versions are cropped differently).
座標為遊戲內地圖座標(範圍 ±{bound},x 向東、y 向北,北方朝上)。底: Coordinates are in-game map coordinates (range ±{bound}; x east, y north, north up). If the background's orientation differs, use Flip N-S / Flip E-W.
, palserver GUI 就是我做的!這隻工具是免費的, 如果它幫上你的忙: , the maker of palserver GUI! This tool is free — if it helped you, the sleepy kitty would love some treats. A follow or a small donation is huge encouragement to keep making it better.
感謝你讓帕魯世界更好玩 🐾: Thanks for making the Palworld world more fun 🐾
已經有一個 Palworld 世界想搬進來?不管是別台專用伺服器、v1 舊版,還: Already have a Palworld world to bring over? Another dedicated server, v1, or a local co-op invite-code save — all can be adopted.
是把「啟用世界」指到你的存檔 —— 在: is pointing the active world at your save — one click on the
遷移前務必停止伺服器,來源端遊戲也要關閉: Stop the server before migrating; close the source game too
新實例先啟動一次再停止,讓存檔資料夾生成: Start the new instance once, then stop it, so save folders are generated
本機邀請碼存檔需額外修正玩家角色: Local invite-code saves need an extra player-character fix
測試版(Beta)可能不穩定,但含較新的功能(例如玩家細節 API)。\n\n確:
Beta builds may be unstable but include newer features (e.g. the player-detail API).

Install the latest beta?
確定要移除 {label} 嗎?\n\n會刪除它安裝的檔案({extra}也會一:
Remove {label}?

Its installed files will be deleted ({extra} too). This cannot be undone; takes effect after restart.
,要等模組作者釋出相容版本(通常改版後幾天內)。若改版後伺服器啟動異常或閃退,先: until their authors ship compatible versions (usually within days). If the server misbehaves or crashes after an update, come back here to
模組再開服。: the mods before starting the server.
伺服器運作中:安裝、更新或移除模組需要先停止伺服器(執行中時模組檔案被鎖定)。: Server is running: stop it before installing, updating or removing mods (their files are locked while running).
安裝最新測試版(含較新功能,可能不穩定): Install the latest beta (newer features, may be unstable)
「玩家細節(查看帕魯/背包)」需要 v1.8.0 以上的測試版才支援。: Player detail (Pals/inventory viewer) needs beta v1.8.0 or later.
安裝或更新後,重啟伺服器才會生效。: Installs and updates take effect after a server restart.
尚無 Lua 模組。先安裝 UE4SS,之後就能在此上傳與管理模組。: No Lua mods yet. Install UE4SS first; then you can upload and manage mods here.
尚無 Lua 模組。用上方的「開啟 Lua 模組資料夾」上傳模組資料夾。: No Lua mods yet. Use "Open Lua mods folder" above to upload mod folders.
尚無 Pak 模組。用上方的「開啟 Paks 資料夾」上傳 .pak 檔(Blu: No Pak mods yet. Use "Open Paks folder" above to upload .pak files (Blueprint mods go in the LogicMods subfolder).
直接編輯、上傳或刪除伺服器目錄裡的檔案(例如 PalDefender 的 Con: Edit, upload or delete files in the server directory directly (e.g. PalDefender's Config.json).
已儲存並嘗試熱重載(若 RCON 未啟用則於重啟後生效): Saved; hot-reload attempted (without RCON it takes effect after restart)
玩家加入伺服器時顯示的訊息,每行一則;留空則不顯示。變更需重啟或 reloadc: Shown to players when they join the server, one line per message; leave empty to disable. Takes effect after a restart or reloadcfg.
已啟用 REST API — 重啟伺服器後生效: REST API enabled — takes effect after restart
已停用 REST API — 重啟後生效: REST API disabled — takes effect after restart
存取權杖已就緒 — 若查詢顯示尚未生效,重啟伺服器一次: Access token ready — if queries still fail, restart the server once
尚未生成 REST 設定 — 啟動一次伺服器即會產生。: REST config not generated yet — start the server once to create it.
啟用後,可在玩家分頁點玩家查看其帕魯與背包。變更需重啟伺服器才會生效。: When enabled, click a player on the Players tab to see their Pals and inventory. Changes take effect after restart.
啟用後,可在玩家分頁點玩家查看其帕魯與背包。: When enabled, click a player on the Players tab to see their Pals and inventory.
agent 用它讀取玩家資料,只在本機使用。: The agent uses it to read player data; local use only.
伺服器未在運作中,啟動後即可看到即時效能。: Server is not running — start it to see live performance.
收集資料中,稍待幾秒走勢就會出現。: Collecting data — trends appear in a few seconds.
伺服器 FPS 越接近設定的目標越流暢;明顯偏低代表 CPU 吃緊,可到「引擎微: The closer server FPS is to its target, the smoother the game; a clear drop means CPU pressure — tune it on the Engine tab.
玩家細節需要安裝 PalDefender 並啟用其 REST API。: Player detail requires PalDefender with its REST API enabled.
PalDefender 目前只支援讀取「線上」玩家的帕魯與背包;這位玩家離線中,: PalDefender can only read Pals and inventory for players who are online. This player is offline — check again once they're online.
離線玩家的背包資料無法讀取(同上)。: Inventory can't be read for offline players (see above).
確定要{verb}「{name}」嗎?此舉動會將他從伺服器移除。: {verb} "{name}"? This removes them from the server.
目前無法連線到伺服器的 REST API: Can't reach the server's REST API right now
輸入要廣播給所有玩家的訊息…: Message to broadcast to all players…
尚未記錄到任何玩家。agent 每 15 秒會記錄一次在線狀態。: No players recorded yet. The agent samples online status every 15 seconds.
離線玩家仍可在「指令」分頁被選為目標(例如 unban)。: Offline players can still be targeted on the Console tab (e.g. unban).
讀取失敗 —— 政策全文請見 GitHub repo 的 PRIVACY.md。: Failed to load — see PRIVACY.md in the GitHub repo for the full policy.
需連續超標才會動作,避免一時的記憶體尖峰誤觸發。: Only sustained breaches trigger a restart, so brief memory spikes don't.
每小時最多自動重啟次數(超過則停止嘗試): Max auto-restarts per hour (stops trying beyond this)
手動停止伺服器不會被視為崩潰。達到上限後會停止自動重啟,避免無限重啟迴圈。: Manually stopping the server doesn't count as a crash. After the cap is hit, auto-restart stops to avoid an infinite loop.
計畫性重啟前的預告秒數(0 = 不預告): Warning seconds before planned restarts (0 = none)
會透過 REST API 廣播給線上玩家,並在重啟前先存檔。崩潰重啟不預告(伺服: Broadcast to online players via REST API, and the world is saved before restarting. Crash restarts have no warning (the server is already gone).
還原備份「{name}」會覆蓋目前的世界存檔。\n\n還原前會自動先幫現有存檔做:
Restoring backup "{name}" overwrites the current world save.

A safety backup of the current save is made first. Continue?
已還原 {guid};原存檔已備份為 {backup}: Restored {guid}; previous save backed up as {backup}
伺服器運作中:可以建立備份,但還原存檔、切換世界、刪除玩家存檔需要先停止伺服器。: Server is running: you can create backups, but restoring, switching worlds, or deleting player saves requires stopping it first.
已設為啟用世界(下次啟動生效): Set as active world (takes effect next start)
刪除玩家存檔「{file}」後,該玩家再次加入時會是全新角色。\n\n確定嗎?:
After deleting player save "{file}", that player rejoins as a brand-new character.

Are you sure?
把伺服器指向這個世界: Point the server at this world
瀏覽、編輯或上傳這個世界的存檔檔案: Browse, edit or upload this world's save files
刪除後該玩家會以全新角色加入: After deletion the player rejoins as a new character
沒有玩家在線上時跳過(避免堆積一模一樣的備份): Skip when no players are online (avoids stacking identical backups)
尚未執行過。備份只在伺服器運作中進行。: Not run yet. Backups only run while the server is up.
找不到 PalWorldSettings.ini — 先啟動一次伺服器讓它生成設: PalWorldSettings.ini not found — start the server once to generate it
重新產生配對碼?\n\n舊的配對碼與登入連結會立刻失效,已連線的裝置不受影響。:
Regenerate the pairing code?

The old code and login links stop working immediately; already-connected devices are unaffected.
清除這個瀏覽器上的暫存資料?\n\n會清掉:已儲存的連線、看過的公告、地圖校正、:
Clear this browser's cached data?

Removes: saved connection, seen announcements, map calibration, preferences, etc.
The page reloads; servers and saves are completely unaffected.
想在手機或另一台電腦管理這台伺服器?在那台裝置的瀏覽器打開下面的連結(或打開 a: Want to manage this server from a phone or another computer? Open the link below in that device's browser (or open the agent URL and enter the pairing code). The device must be on the same LAN or VPN as this host.
一鍵登入連結(複製給其他裝置打開): One-tap login links (copy to the other device)
偵測不到區網/VPN 位址。若要讓其他裝置連線,請確認這台主機已連上區網或 VP: No LAN/VPN address detected. To let other devices connect, make sure this host is on a LAN or VPN, and open that address (e.g. Tailscale 100.x) plus
舊連結外流時可重設;重設後舊的配對碼即失效。: Reset if an old link leaks; the old pairing code stops working immediately.
你目前是本機免密碼連線,手上沒有 token。API token 顯示在 age: You're connected locally without a password, so no token here. The API token is shown in the agent's window (the "API token" line).
回報匿名的使用計數(安裝數、伺服器建立/啟動數、不重複玩家數),幫助我們了解使用: Reports anonymous usage counts (installs, servers created/started, unique players) to help us understand adoption.
不含任何個資、IP、伺服器名稱或存檔內容: No personal data, IPs, server names or save contents
清掉這個瀏覽器上存的連線、看過的公告與偏好設定(localStorage / c: Clears the connection, seen announcements and preferences stored in this browser (localStorage / cookies). Useful when the UI is stuck on stale data or you want to log out and re-pair.
更新到 {version}?\n\nagent 會重新啟動(約數秒),執行中的遊:
Update to {version}?

The agent restarts (a few seconds); running game servers are unaffected.
自動檢查新版本(每 6 小時,只通知不安裝): Auto-check for new versions (every 6 hours, notify only)
查到新版就自動安裝並重啟 agent: Auto-install new versions and restart the agent
agent 重新啟動中,稍候會自動重新整理…: Agent restarting — the page reloads automatically shortly…
更新會重新下載伺服器檔案(數 GB),期間伺服器無法啟動。\n\n確定要更新嗎?:
Updating re-downloads the server files (several GB); the server can't start meanwhile.

Update now?
未知(啟動一次伺服器即可取得): Unknown (start the server once to detect)
有新版本可更新。更新前建議先到「存檔備份」建立一份備份。: An update is available. Before updating, make a backup on the Saves & backups tab.
無法判斷是否有新版本(可能連不上 Steam)。: Can't determine whether an update exists (Steam may be unreachable).
登出後角色留在世界中: Character stays in world after logout
可撿其他公會玩家的死亡掉落物: Can loot other guilds' death drops
隱藏其他公會據點範圍特效: Hide other guilds' base area FX
伺服器每秒送給玩家的更新次數。提高會更跟手,但吃 CPU;人數越多、據點與帕魯越: Updates the server sends players per second. Higher feels more responsive but costs CPU; more players, bases and Pals lower the tick rate you can sustain.
不建議超過 120;撐不住時反而更卡。低於 50 會明顯影響手感。: Not recommended above 120 — if the CPU can't keep up it gets worse. Below 50 noticeably hurts game feel.
提高可減少高 Tick 率下的封包裁切,代價是上行頻寬。: Raising it reduces packet clipping at high tick rates, at the cost of upload bandwidth.
同上,套用在非區網玩家。通常與上一項設為相同值。: Same as above, applied to non-LAN players. Usually set to the same value.
伺服器卡頓時,調高可避免玩家被誤踢。: Raise it so lag spikes don't wrongly kick players.
世界很大、載入很久時,調高可避免玩家在進場途中斷線。: For large, slow-loading worlds, raise it so players don't disconnect while joining.
讓伺服器以固定步進運行,模擬較穩定。: Runs the server at a fixed step for more stable simulation.
與 Tick 率互相影響。硬體不夠力時開啟反而會拖慢模擬,建議搭配觀察伺服器 F: Interacts with the tick rate. On weak hardware it can slow the simulation — watch server FPS when using it.
僅在「固定畫格率」開啟時生效,通常設為與 Tick 率相同。: Only takes effect with fixed frame rate on; usually set equal to the tick rate.
讓畫格時間變化較平緩,減少突發的頓挫。: Smooths frame-time variation, reducing sudden hitches.
回收待刪物件的間隔。調短可壓低記憶體佔用,但每次回收可能造成短暫頓挫;調長則相反: How often pending objects are collected. Shorter keeps memory lower but each pass may hitch briefly; longer is the opposite.
移除本面板管理的設定,回到引擎預設行為。: Removes settings managed by this panel, returning to engine defaults.
社群常用的調校:Tick 率 60、放寬頻寬與逾時。多數伺服器適用。: The community's usual tuning: tick rate 60, relaxed bandwidth and timeouts. Fits most servers.
Tick 率 90,適合 CPU 單核效能強、人數少的伺服器。務必觀察伺服器 F: Tick rate 90 — for servers with strong single-core CPUs and few players. Watch server FPS closely.
偵測到作弊時傳送警告訊息給該玩家。: Sends a warning message to the player when cheating is detected.
IP 封鎖可能誤傷同一 IP 下的其他玩家。: IP bans can hit other players behind the same IP.
關閉後模組/除錯道具將不再被攔截,一般不建議停用。: When off, modded/debug items are no longer blocked — generally not recommended.
PvP 對建築最大傷害(0 = 不限): PvP max damage to structures (0 = unlimited)
PvP 對玩家最大傷害(0 = 不限): PvP max damage to players (0 = unlimited)
PvP 對帕魯最大傷害(0 = 不限): PvP max damage to Pals (0 = unlimited)
PvE 帕魯傷害封鎖閥值(0 = 關閉): PvE Pal damage block threshold (0 = off)
限制每棵樹的最短破壞時間,避免火箭快速砍樹造成大量卡頓。0 = 關閉。: Enforces a minimum time to fell each tree, preventing rocket-speed logging from causing heavy lag. 0 = off.
需在 adminIPs 設定 IP(用原始檔編輯)。官方建議開啟以防漏洞。: Requires IPs in adminIPs (edit the raw file). Officially recommended against exploits.
白名單管理員加入時自動登入管理模式: Whitelisted admins auto-enter admin mode on join
防止管理員密碼在聊天中外洩: Prevent admin password leaking in chat
允許管理員使用作弊指令(如 godmode): Allow admins to use cheat commands (e.g. godmode)
PalDefender 啟動失敗時關閉伺服器: Shut down server if PalDefender fails to start
保護存檔不在無反外掛的情況下運行。: Protects the save from running without anti-cheat.
這會以錯誤碼結束行程。若同時開啟本 GUI 的「崩潰後自動重啟」,可能造成無限重: This exits with an error code. Combined with this GUI's crash auto-restart it can create an infinite restart loop — pick one.
\n> **開始之前**:所有遷移都要在**伺服器停止**下進行,來源端的遊戲/:
> **Before you start**: do every migration with the **server stopped**, and fully close the source game/server too. Palworld writes saves continuously while running — a half-copied file is a broken file.

## The most important concept

The server does not automatically load "the one" world folder. It reads `DedicatedServerName=` in `GameUserSettings.ini` and looks for the folder with that GUID. Nine out of ten failed migrations are this line not matching — the server can't find the world and silently starts a brand-new one.

Good news: on the GUI's **Saves & backups** tab, every world's GUID and "active" status is listed clearly. Clicking "Set as active world" fixes that line for you — no manual editing.

## Scenario A: from another dedicated server

The simplest case — the format is identical.

1. On the **source**, stop the old server, go to `Pal/Saved/SaveGames/0/`, find your world folder (an alphanumeric GUID) and zip the whole thing.
2. On the **target**, after creating the instance in the GUI, **start it once and stop it** — Palworld only generates saves and config files on first launch.
3. GUI → **Mods** tab → "Browse all" → navigate to `Pal/Saved/SaveGames/0/` and upload the .sav files inside the GUID folder.
4. GUI → **Saves & backups** tab → find the uploaded world → click "**Set as active world**".
5. Start the server; players join with their original characters.

> **Do not copy the old `GameUserSettings.ini` directly.** It carries the old host's PublicIP and RCON settings, breaking server-list display or remote management. Only `DedicatedServerName` needs changing — and the GUI does that for you.

## Scenario B: from v1 palserver-GUI

The `Pal/Saved/` structure under v1 is exactly the same as scenario A — follow those steps.

If v1 is on the same machine, it's even easier to **adopt in place**: when creating the instance, set "existing server directory" to the v1 server folder (the level containing `PalServer.exe`). World, mods and settings are all taken over in place — no file moving.

## Scenario C: from local co-op (4-player invite code)

The only scenario that hits **character reset**: local saves encode PlayerUid differently from dedicated servers, so moving players over directly forces them to recreate characters (Pals and buildings remain; the character is gone).

1. Find the local save: `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Pal\Saved\SaveGames\<your SteamID>\<world GUID>\`
2. Upload it under the server's `SaveGames/0/` as in scenario A.
3. Use the community tool [palworld-host-save-fix](https://github.com/xNul/palworld-host-save-fix) to convert the host player's .sav to dedicated-server format (you need the old host save's filename, and each player must join the server once to generate their new PlayerUid).
4. Back in the GUI: "Set as active world" → start.

> No tool guarantees a 100% successful host-character transfer. **Click "Back up now" in the GUI before touching anything** — one-click restore if things go wrong.

## Post-migration checklist

- On the **Saves & backups** tab, your world shows "Active"
- World size looks right (an empty world is usually under 1 MB; a played world starts at tens of MB)
- No `Save data is corrupted` in the logs after starting
- In-game, buildings, Pals and levels are all there

## FAQ

**It's a brand-new world; everything is gone** — `DedicatedServerName` doesn't point at your GUID. Go to Saves & backups and click "Set as active world".

**The world is there but I must recreate my character** — scenario C's PlayerUid issue, see step 3 above; if it's server-to-server, check the `Players/` folder wasn't missed.

**`Save data is corrupted` on start** — the source wasn't shut down cleanly during the copy, or the transfer was truncated. Restore from backup and copy again.

**Cross-platform (Windows ↔ Linux)** — works; the `.sav` format is identical. Config files live in `Config/WindowsServer/` vs `Config/LinuxServer/` respectively, and the GUI handles that per platform automatically.
伺服器端驗證,防止已知外掛、漏洞與惡意崩潰(前身為 Palguard)。安裝後啟: Server-side validation against known cheats, exploits and malicious crashes (formerly Palguard). After installing, start the server once to generate its config.
Lua / Blueprint 模組的執行環境。安裝後即可在下方管理 Lua 模: Runtime for Lua / Blueprint mods. Once installed, manage Lua mods below.
版本更新、存檔備份、崩潰救援、連線設定,月費制透明計價,維運交給我們。: Version updates, save backups, crash rescue, connectivity setup — transparent monthly pricing, operations handled by us.
這條設定連結的配對碼無效或已過期,請重新輸入。: The pairing code in this setup link is invalid or expired — please enter it again.
你正透過 https 網站連到 http 的 agent,瀏覽器會封鎖。請改用區: You are connecting from an https page to an http agent — the browser blocks this. Connect directly over LAN/VPN (bundled build) or use the http version of this page.
連不到這個位址的 agent。確認 agent 正在執行、位址與連接埠正確,且你: Can't reach an agent at this address. Make sure the agent is running, the address and port are correct, and you're on the same LAN or VPN.
配對碼無效或已過期。請確認和 agent 視窗上顯示的一致。: The pairing code is invalid or expired. Make sure it matches what the agent window shows.
本專案原始碼公開,個人與非商業用途可自由使用、修改與散布,: The source is public. Free to use, modify and share for personal and noncommercial purposes —
這個路徑由 agent 自動管理。你可以改指到自己的安裝目錄。: This path is managed automatically by the agent. You can point it at your own installation directory.
你指定的伺服器安裝目錄。: The server installation directory you specified.
改路徑不會搬移檔案。填既有的 PalServer 安裝目錄會直接採用;填空資料夾: Changing the path does not move files. Point at an existing PalServer install to adopt it as-is; point at an empty or new folder to install there on next start; leave blank to return to the agent-managed folder.
請先停止伺服器再修改路徑。: Stop the server before changing the path.
移除這個伺服器實例。此動作無法復原。: Remove this server instance. This cannot be undone.
世界存檔會保留在磁碟上: World saves are kept on disk

此伺服器未設定管理員密碼,密碼欄留空即可。: This server has no admin password set — leave the password field blank.

,所以檔案小、方便搬到別台。: ; it stays small and easy to move to another machine.
用相同設定與世界存檔開一個新伺服器(自動換新名稱與遊戲埠)。同樣不含遊戲檔案,新: Create a new server with the same settings and world saves (a new name and game port are assigned automatically). Game files are excluded too; the new server installs them on first start.
已複製為「{name}」(遊戲埠 {port}),可在伺服器列表找到它。: Copied as "{name}" (game port {port}); find it in the server list.
請先停止伺服器再複製,才能得到乾淨的存檔複本。: Stop the server before duplicating to get a clean copy of the saves.
磁碟空間不足,請清出更多空間後再試(Palworld 伺服器約需數十 GB)。: Not enough disk space. Free up more space and try again (a Palworld server needs tens of GB).
搬移到(絕對路徑;留空 = 搬回 agent 管理的資料夾): Move to (absolute path; blank = back to agent-managed)
儲存後會把現有的伺服器檔案實際搬到新位置。目標需為空資料夾或不存在的路徑;同磁碟: Saving relocates the existing server files to the new location. The target must be an empty folder or a non-existent path. Same-disk moves are instant; cross-disk moves (e.g. C: to D:) copy the files and can take a while when there are many.
請先停止伺服器再搬移路徑。: Stop the server before moving the path.

玩家細節需要安裝 PalDefender 並啟用其 REST API。PalDe: Player detail requires PalDefender with its REST API enabled. PalDefender 1.8.0+ can query offline players too.
由 PalDefender 提供:列出存檔內所有玩家(含從未被本 GUI 記錄過: From PalDefender: every player in the save (including offline players this GUI never recorded). Click any to view their Pals, inventory and progression.
Kubernetes(遙控叢集內的 StatefulSet): Kubernetes (drive a StatefulSet in your cluster)
k8s 模式不會幫你部署伺服器,而是遙控叢集裡「已存在」的 PalServer: k8s mode doesn't deploy a server for you — it drives an existing PalServer StatefulSet in your cluster: start/stop scales replicas between 1 and 0, and saves/backups run via kubectl exec into the Pod. The agent connects using PALSERVER_KUBECONFIG, an in-Pod ServiceAccount, or ~/.kube/config, in that order.
Service 名稱(選填,用來顯示連線位址): Service name (optional, for the connect address)

計畫性重啟以及你手動按停止 / 重啟時,都會先在遊戲聊天室倒數公告這麼多秒(手動: Both scheduled restarts and your manual stop / restart count down this many seconds in the in-game chat first (manual uses the interface language) and save the world before restarting. Crash restarts skip the warning (the server is already gone).

風險提示:PalSchema 為社群 mod、僅支援 Windows(nativ: Heads-up: PalSchema is a community mod, works only on Windows (native) servers, and depends on a specific UE4SS version (it can break temporarily after a game update). Back up your save before installing or changing stats.
改的是物種基礎值,會套用到該物種所有個體;首領(Boss_)/ 高塔首領(GYM: You're editing species base values, applied to every individual of that species. Bosses (Boss_) and tower bosses (GYM_) are separate rows and only affect their version. Restart the server after saving so it applies to newly encountered Pals. Empty fields won't overwrite existing values.
先選一隻帕魯再編輯數值。: Select a Pal first, then edit its stats.

多台伺服器?這些埠都不能重複: Running multiple servers? These ports must not overlap
同一台主機上跑多個伺服器時,每台的以下埠都必須各自不同,否則會發生埠綁定衝突,導: When running multiple servers on the same host, the following ports must be unique for each server. Otherwise, port binding conflicts will occur, preventing the server from starting or players from connecting:
遊戲埠(port) · Steam 查詢埠(queryport) · RCON: Game Port (port) · Steam Query Port (queryport) · RCON Port · REST API Port · PalDefender REST Port (default 17993)
這個路徑由 agent 自動管理。: This path is managed automatically by the agent.
同機多台伺服器的查詢埠必須不同,否則儲存時會回報衝突。: When running multiple servers on the same machine, query ports must be different, or saving will report a conflict.
點地圖任一處放置圖釘,選好按「使用此座標」。傳送高度(Z)由伺服器自動找地面。: Click anywhere on the map to place a pin, then click "Use This Coordinate". Teleport height (Z) is automatically determined by the server based on ground level.

改動需重啟 agent 才生效。由環境變數設定的項目以環境變數為準,無法在此修改: Changes take effect after restarting the agent. Fields set by an environment variable are controlled by it and can't be changed here.
強制要求識別碼(本機也要): Always require a code (even on localhost)
透過 Cloudflare Tunnel / 反向代理對外曝露時務必開啟,否則任: Turn this on when exposing the agent via Cloudflare Tunnel / a reverse proxy — otherwise anyone who reaches it can manage it without a password.

agent 啟動時自動打開管理介面(下次啟動生效)。放伺服器的機器沒有螢幕時可關: Automatically opens the management panel when the agent starts (takes effect next startup). Turn it off on a headless server machine.
